essay_prompts: Business-Minded Essay: Please reflect on how your choices have influenced your career path and aspirations. (300 words)
Leadership-Focused Essay: What experiences have shaped how you invest in others and how you lead? (250 words)
Growth-Oriented Essay: Curiosity can be seen in many ways. Please share an example of how you have demonstrated curiosity and how that has influenced your growth. (up to 250 words)
data.key_differentiators: Harvard Business School is the home of the case method of business education and has one of the largest and most influential alumni networks in the world, with 20% of the top three executive positions at Fortune 500 companies filled by HBS alumni. Students become part of smaller community 'sections' of about ninety students with dedicated faculty teams for a more intimate learning experience within the larger program.
